{"parts":[{"content":"V is asking what remains to fully operationalize the unidirectional va → zoputer relationship. Let me think through what's built vs what needs to happen for the system to actually work.

Built:
1. Security Gate (D1.1)
2. Audit System (D1.2)
3. API Communication Layer (D1.3)
4. Archetype Setup Guide (D2.1)
5. Content Classifier (D2.2)
6. Zoffice Workers Framework (D2.3)
7. Daily Export Pipeline (D3.1)
8. Calendly Integration (D3.2)
9. Localization Framework (D4.1)
10. Client Onboarding Flow (D4.2)

But "built" means the skills/scripts exist. What needs to happen for the system to actually run?

1. **Initial seeding** - zoputer needs the core skills exported to it
2. **Scheduled export agent** - the daily 9 AM export needs to be set up as an actual scheduled agent
3. **zoputer-side setup** - zoputer needs to have the receiving infrastructure (folder structure, maybe some scripts)
4. **Localization maintainer** - needs to be deployed on zoputer as a scheduled agent
5. **Audit DB initialization** - both sides need the audit DBs set up
6. **Calendly webhook** - if they want the Calendly integration, that needs to be wired up

Let me check what's actually deployed vs just written as code.","id":null,"signature":"","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_details":null,"part_kind":"thinking"},{"content":"Let me audit what's built vs what's actually deployed/operational:","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"text"},{"tool_name":"run_bash_command","args":"{"cmd": "# Check what scheduled agents exist for the consultancy stack\npython3 << 'EOF'\nimport json\nimport subprocess\n\nresult = subprocess.run([\"python3\", \"-c\", \"\"\"\nfrom pathlib import Path\nimport json\n# Check if there's an agents list we can query\nprint(\"Checking for consultancy-related scheduled agents...\")\n\"\"\"], capture_output=True, text=True)\nprint(result.stdout)\nEOF"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01AcAg89NPZP3q2f9Qtht7Ze","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"},{"tool_name":"list_agents","args":"{}","tool_call_id":"toolu_011mBZGaU5xXzSCSb8K9dsiz","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":62003,"cache_write_tokens":53599,"cache_read_tokens":8394,"output_tokens":546,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":53599,"cache_read_input_tokens":8394,"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":546}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T11:25:15.029745Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01VVT8RUEYSYWyn9piG676jn","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"578f617b-b78f-4857-a362-544ca4453845","metadata":null}
